description.default: Minimum composite AI validation score (0-100) required for fast-track routing. Applications below this threshold go to Equipment Leader for full manual review.

label.description: Minimum composite AI validation score (0-100) required for fast-track routing. Applications below this threshold go to Equipment Leader for full manual review.

hint.default: Default 75. Raise to 85 after AI models are tuned with 3+ months of production data.

label.description: Default 75. Raise to 85 after AI models are tuned with 3+ months of production data.
